store_headline: Clean Music WordPress Theme for Solo Artists
store_subheadline: Launch a professional music website with discography, events, audio players, and merch.
features: Clean and professional design aesthetic for music industry
Portfolio showcase for music projects and collaborations
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Elementor page builder with music-specific elements
Video thumbnail generator for professional media showcases
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
WooCommerce integration for merchandise and music sales
Contact form integration for professional inquiries
One-click demo import with complete professional setups
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The warm alternative in the solo-artist space — beige and wood-toned palette no other music theme replicates
Studio mic on wooden surface hero that communicates intimacy and craft, not edge or spectacle
Built for singer-songwriters and acoustic artists who need credibility without darkness or drama
Minimal layout that puts the artistry first, not the design
Complete music feature set — discography, events, audio players, WooCommerce — wrapped in a warm professional identity
Elementor-powered with Slider Revolution for flexible page building without a developer
Strong press and portfolio section positions you credibly for music industry contacts
The adult-contemporary answer to the catalog's dark, glitchy, and heavy music theme alternatives
key_benefits: Attract industry contacts with a warm, professional presence that signals artistry
Showcase your discography in an intimate studio setting, not a nightclub
Sell merch through WooCommerce without disrupting your site's intimate acoustic tone
Build press credibility with a portfolio designed for labels and promoters
Launch tour dates on layouts that feel personal and handcrafted
Stand apart from dark music themes with a folk and acoustic palette
Convert visitors into fans with a browsing experience built for listeners
design_features: Professional video galleries with custom thumbnails
Multiple header styles with refined aesthetics

testimonials.text: We recently purchased this theme and there is not much to say except for our extreme satisfaction with the theme itself and the customer support we received.It is simply outstanding. Whenever we had a question or encountered an issue, we were assisted promptly and effectively. Our requests were handled in record time, allowing us to continue our work without interruption, which is very important to us. Whether it was for minor adjustments or more complex issues, we were guided with great professionalism. In addition to the exceptional support, the Effigy theme itself is of impeccable quality, well-designed, easy to use, and offers a multitude of features that perfectly meet our expectations.
testimonials.author: NextPlayMG

testimonials.text: We can’t say enough great things about the Effigy WordPress Theme by @Wolf-Themes! The design is absolutely brilliant—clean, elegant, and tailored perfectly for bands. Our clients are thrilled with their stunning new website, and we’ve received so many compliments on how professional and user-friendly it looks.The theme functions flawlessly, offering everything needed to showcase music, manage events, and sell merch with ease. On top of that, the support from @Wolf-Themes has been incredibly fast and helpful when needed, ensuring a smooth setup and customization process. Thank you for such a wonderfully designed theme and your top-rated service—keep up the great work! ✨
testimonials.author: GINGALLEY

testimonials.text: Well designed and flexible theme for music industry needs. We built a label website for https://readyrecords.ca. This theme provides many options and developer is very responsive. Would recommend.
testimonials.author: iants
